name: open-browser-search
title: Open Browser Search
description: Search any website and choose which browser opens the results
author: admad

commands.name: search-any-site
commands.title: Search Websites
commands.description: Search any saved website with autocomplete, open results in your preferred browser

commands.name: manage-saved-sites
commands.title: Manage Saved Sites
commands.description: Add, edit, and delete saved search sites

preferences.name: defaultBrowser
preferences.title: Default Browser
preferences.description: The browser to open search results in by default. Leave empty to use the system default browser.

preferences.name: prefillFromClipboard
preferences.title: Other Settings
preferences.label: Prefill search from clipboard
preferences.description: Pre-fill the search field with clipboard text

preferences.name: interpretDdgBangs
preferences.label: Strip DuckDuckGo bangs for suggestions
preferences.description: Remove DuckDuckGo bang prefixes when fetching search suggestions
